music_theory_secrets.focus_note: Build lead magnet + squeeze page first. Do NOT promote the course or membership yet.
hooks: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.
4 chords. That's what separates someone who plays piano from someone who wishes they could.
Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.
Gospel piano isn't complicated. It's just been taught wrong.
Church musicians learn more in 6 months than classical students do in 3 years. Here's why.
music_theory_secrets.transformation: Play the songs you love by ear — no sheet music, no years of lessons

colvin_enterprises.focus_note: Drive audit bookings via cold outreach and content. Pilot and retainer come after the audit converts.
hooks: You're paying people to be robots.
How much is manual invoicing or scheduling costing you every month?
The most expensive thing in your business isn't software. It's manual work disguised as a job description.
Every hour your team spends on data entry is an hour they're not selling, serving, or growing.
AI doesn't replace your people. It fires the robot that lives inside their job description.
colvin_enterprises.transformation: Reclaim the hours and payroll burned on robot work — without hiring anyone new

indiana_backflow.cta_consumers: Find a certified tester near you
indiana_backflow.focus_note: Fill listings via tester outreach first. SEO/AEO pages compound in background. Monetize testers before building consumer funnel.
hooks: You're invisible for the searches that book backflow jobs.
People in Indianapolis search for backflow testing every month. Are you showing up?
Missing your annual backflow test isn't just a violation — it can shut off your water.
Backflow test due? Avoid the fine. Find a certified tester near you in 60 seconds.
indiana_backflow.transformation: Testers: booked jobs without marketing spend. Managers: certified tester found in 60 seconds.

first_keys_indy.rung_label: Land one committed agent before building the funnel
first_keys_indy.cta_buyers: Get the free first-time buyer checklist
first_keys_indy.cta_agents: Book a 15-min call to see how the funnel works
first_keys_indy.focus_note: CRITICAL: Present the opportunity to agents first. Do not build the consumer funnel until one agent is committed.
hooks: You don't need 20% down to buy your first home in Indianapolis.
Marion County has programs that cover your down payment. Most first-time buyers don't know they exist.
The biggest mistake first-time homebuyers make is waiting until they think they're ready.
I run a funnel that books appointments with motivated first-time buyers. Want a full calendar?
first_keys_indy.transformation: Buyers: go from confused to confident and in your first home. Agents: consistent, qualified appointments without chasing leads.

funding_ready_indiana.cta: Book your free funding discovery call
funding_ready_indiana.focus_note: Indiana small businesses and nonprofits seeking grants and SBA funding.
hooks: Indiana has millions in small business funding that most owners never apply for.
The grant application most Indiana businesses skip is the one they'd actually win.
You don't need a grant writer. You need to know which grants you already qualify for.
funding_ready_indiana.transformation: Walk away knowing exactly which funding sources to apply for — and how to qualify
